{{Quote|This battle is not the last stand. It has nothing to do with honor or a willingness to meet death. This is a feint. Fortunately, I have my suspicions about where the would-be surprise blow is coming from.|[[Nas Choka]]|<ref name="Unifying" />}}
The '''Defense of Mon Calamari''' took place in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Prelude==
Prior to the battle, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] were losing territory to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] rapidly and the [[World Brain]] on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]] was imperfect in its [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] attempts. Despite having lost a third of the entire [[Warrior caste]] during the course of the invasion and his forces being stretched too thin, [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] ordered a massive assault on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], the provisional capital of the Galactic Alliance. The Galactic Alliance took advantage of this by dividing its forces and sending half to Yuuzhan'tar while the other half would defend Mon Calamari.

==The battle==
During the battle, [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] along with thousands of pilots, crewmen, and gunners fought in the space surrounding Mon Calamari. The Yuuzhan Vong armada was clustered in the form of a yammosk. Each of its tentacles contained hundreds of Yuuzhan Vong warships. The actual yammosk vessels were in the center of this formation, protected by countless warships, battleships, and coralskippers. To disrupt their staging efforts, the Galactic Alliance sent the team of [[Kyp Durron]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]], and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to kill a [[yammosk]] on nearby [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]]. The yammosk was used by the extragalactic aliens to coordinate their forces in combat. With the death of a yammosk, the Yuuzhan Vong forces would be scattered.

Later it was discovered that it was the biological weapon [[Alpha Red (pathogen)|Alpha Red]] that had killed the yammosk, and it also destroyed much of Caluula's biosphere. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], [[Vergere]] had sabotaged and destroyed Alpha Red, though certain elements of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] had restarted the project and unleashed it on Caluula. Though Alpha Red destroyed all [[Yuuzhan Vong]] lifeforms in its path, it wasn't as efficient as planned and could also contaminate non-Yuuzhan Vong life forms. Worse, a Yuuzhan Vong vessel infected with the disease had escaped Caluula and was on the way to Yuuzhan'tar.

But the Yuuzhan Vong kept pressing their attack, even with the loss of the yammosk at Caluula. They had actually never intended to use Caluula or [[Toong'l/Legends|Toong'l]] as draw back areas. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] was about to order a retreat, when the Yuuzhan Vong armada received word that [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] had entered the Yuuzhan'tar system. Realizing that Yuuzhan'tar came first, [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] ordered the fleet to withdraw, thus ending the battle of Mon Calamari.
